message:
🐛 Fix search results clicking doing nothing for catalog cards and non-sidebar dashboards (#1984)

- Catalog card search results (cards not placed on any dashboard) now navigate
  to the main dashboard and open the Add Card modal (/?addCard=true)
- De-duplicate search results: when a card is already placed on a dashboard,
  prefer the placed version (which navigates + scrolls) over the catalog version
- For discoverable dashboards not in the user's sidebar, clicking a search
  result navigates to the page and auto-opens the sidebar customizer so the
  user can add the dashboard to their sidebar

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
